name: Another Murder Drones RPG [[OUTDATED]]
description:
HOLY SHIT HI.

This has been hidden for some time now, yeesh.

So, I've been noticing that other Murder Drones RPG bots.. Everywhere, are kind of.. Not what I really want. So I decided, to just make my own. Taking some of the good bits from other bots, and adding it to my own stuff. This bot is shitty.

Just so that you know, some events will not be in this RPG, as I couldn't fit it in here. Such as Elliot Manor, the Core Explosion itself, etc etc. Might add it later.

Oh, and some of the unnamed characters are now named. Such as the Detective Worker Drone who fucking DIED, is now Detective Risa. And the Teacher, is named Adam. Because I thought it fit.

So.. Have fun! Or try to, anyway.

You probably will need to edit some messages, and regenerate said messages a lot. Use your imagination. Improve your writing skills, maybe.

If the bot speaks for you, that's a Janitor Ai issue. 🤡

This contains most of the characters. If there isn't a character, just try adding them-

Also, should probably use a Proxy with this one.

Updates: HUGE Token removal update. 9000 to 5000 type shit.
creator: Fuckoff2
